features: Product Specifications: Edraco premium enhanced wax ribbon is 4.33"X 244' ( 110mm X 74m ) and 1/2” core, 10 Rolls+1 Empty Reel/Box, Black

Feature: Enhanced abrasion resistance and outstanding back coat technology make it the right bar code ribbon. Clear Rotated Bar Codes, Sharp Text and Graphics, High Density Printing, Good Scratch Resistance and Extends Print Head Life

Compatible With: This premium enhanced wax compatible for Zebra ZD420, GK420t, GX420t, GX430t, ZD220, ZD500, ZD620, TLP 2844, TLP 3842, TLP 3844-Z R402, TLP 2742,and similar desktop thermal transfer printers
Recommended Label Type: Art Paper, Coated Paper, Plain Paper, Synthetic Paper, Tag
description: Product Description Enhanced Wax Desktop Thermal Transfer Ribbons for Printing High-quality, Sharp and Clear Labels, Bar Codes, Excellent Business and Personal Assistant.
